title: Find the Maximum Element in an Array
description: Write a function to find the maximum element in an array of integers. For example, given [4, 2, 7, 1, 9], return 9.

title: Check if a String is a Palindrome
description: Write a function that returns true if the input string reads the same forward and backward, ignoring case (e.g., 'Radar' → true).

title: Activity Selection Problem
description: Given a set of activities with start and finish times, select the maximum number of non-overlapping activities.

title: Reverse an Array
description: Write a function to reverse an array of integers in place. For example, [1, 2, 3, 4] → [4, 3, 2, 1].

title: Find First Non-Repeating Character
description: Find the first character in a string that appears only once. For example, 'aabbc' → 'c'.

title: Fractional Knapsack
description: Given items with weights and values, maximize value in a knapsack of capacity W, allowing fractions of items.

title: Breadth-First Search
description: Traverse a graph level by level starting from a given vertex. For example, return traversal order for a graph.

title: Depth-First Search
description: Traverse a graph by exploring as far as possible along each branch before backtracking.

title: Dijkstra’s Shortest Path
description: Find the shortest paths from a source vertex to all vertices in a weighted graph with non-negative weights.

title: Bellman-Ford Algorithm
description: Find shortest paths from a source to all vertices, handling negative weights.

title: Floyd-Warshall Algorithm
description: Find shortest paths between all pairs of vertices in a weighted graph.

title: Prim’s Algorithm
description: Find the minimum spanning tree (MST) of a weighted undirected graph.

title: Kruskal’s Algorithm
description: Find the minimum spanning tree by sorting edges and adding non-cyclic ones.

title: Topological Sort
description: Order vertices in a DAG so that for every edge u→v, u comes before v.

title: Union-Find for Cycle Detection
description: Detect if an undirected graph contains a cycle using Union-Find.

title: Tarjan’s Strongly Connected Components
description: Find strongly connected components in a directed graph.

title: Check Power of 2
description: Check if a number is a power of 2 using bit manipulation. For example, 8 → true.

title: Count Set Bits
description: Count the number of 1s in the binary representation of a number. For example, 11 (1011) → 3.

title: Single Number
description: Find the number that appears once in an array where all others appear twice.

title: Toggle Bits
description: Toggle all bits of a number (0→1, 1→0).

title: KMP String Matching
description: Find all occurrences of a pattern in a text using KMP algorithm.

title: Rabin-Karp String Matching
description: Find all occurrences of a pattern in a text using rolling hash.

title: Longest Common Substring
description: Find the longest common substring between two strings.

title: Longest Palindromic Substring
description: Find the longest palindromic substring in a given string.

title: Z-Algorithm for String Matching
description: Compute the Z-array for a string to find all occurrences of a pattern.

title: Binary Search
description: Find an element in a sorted array using binary search.

title: Exponential Search
description: Find an element in a sorted array by exponentially jumping and then binary search.

title: Jump Search
description: Find an element in a sorted array by jumping ahead by a fixed step.

title: Merge Sort
description: Sort an array using the merge sort algorithm.

title: Quick Sort
description: Sort an array using the quicksort algorithm.

title: Heap Sort
description: Sort an array using the heap sort algorithm.

title: Bubble Sort
description: Sort an array using the bubble sort algorithm.

title: Insertion Sort
description: Sort an array using the insertion sort algorithm.

title: Selection Sort
description: Sort an array using the selection sort algorithm.

title: Counting Sort
description: Sort an array with a limited range of values using counting sort.

title: Radix Sort
description: Sort an array using radix sort by processing digits.

title: Bucket Sort
description: Sort an array by distributing elements into buckets.

title: Shell Sort
description: Sort an array using the shell sort algorithm with gap sequences.

title: Linear Search
description: Find an element in an array using linear search.

title: Ternary Search
description: Find an element in a sorted array using ternary search.

title: Interpolation Search
description: Find an element in a sorted array using interpolation search.

title: Fibonacci Search
description: Find an element in a sorted array using Fibonacci numbers.

title: Knuth-Morris-Pratt (KMP) Algorithm
description: Efficient string matching using the KMP algorithm.

title: Aho-Corasick Algorithm
description: Multi-pattern string matching using a trie and failure links.

title: Manacher’s Algorithm
description: Find the longest palindromic substring in linear time.

title: Knapsack Problem (0/1)
description: Find the maximum value that can be put in a knapsack of capacity W.

title: Longest Increasing Subsequence
description: Find the length of the longest increasing subsequence in an array.

title: Matrix Chain Multiplication
description: Find the minimum number of scalar multiplications for matrix chain multiplication.

title: Edit Distance
description: Find the minimum number of operations to transform one string into another.

title: Coin Change
description: Find the minimum number of coins needed to make a given amount.

title: Find Minimum Element in an Array
description: Write a function to find the minimum element in an array of integers. For example, given [4, 2, 7, 1, 9], return 1.

title: Reverse a String
description: Write a function to reverse a string in place. For example, 'hello' → 'olleh'.

title: Job Scheduling
description: Given jobs with deadlines and profits, maximize profit by scheduling jobs within deadlines.

title: Detect Cycle in Directed Graph
description: Check if a directed graph contains a cycle using DFS.

title: Kosaraju’s Algorithm
description: Find strongly connected components in a directed graph.

title: Minimum Path Sum
description: Find the minimum path sum from top-left to bottom-right in a grid, moving only down or right.

title: Count Bits in Range
description: Count the total number of 1s in binary representations of numbers from 1 to n.

title: Z Algorithm
description: Find all occurrences of a pattern in a text using Z algorithm.

title: Modular Inverse
description: Find the modular inverse of a under modulo m (i.e., x such that a*x ≡ 1 (mod m)).

title: Line Sweep for Intervals
description: Find the maximum number of overlapping intervals.

title: Partition Problem
description: Determine if an array can be partitioned into two subsets with equal sum.

title: N-Queens Problem
description: Place N queens on an NxN chessboard so no two queens threaten each other.

title: Kadane’s Algorithm for Maximum Circular Subarray
description: Find the maximum sum of a subarray in a circular array.

title: Longest Valid Parentheses
description: Find the length of the longest valid parentheses substring.

title: Disjoint Set Union (DSU) for Connected Components
description: Find the number of connected components in an undirected graph.

title: Power Set Generation
description: Generate all possible subsets of a given set.

title: Manacher’s Algorithm
description: Find the longest palindromic substring in linear time.

title: Fast Fourier Transform (FFT)
description: Multiply two large polynomials efficiently using FFT.

title: Graham’s Scan for Convex Polygon
description: Determine if a polygon is convex using Graham’s scan.

title: Vertex Cover
description: Find the minimum vertex cover in a bipartite graph.

title: Remove Duplicates from Sorted Array
description: Remove duplicates from a sorted array in place, returning the new length.

title: Anagram Check
description: Check if two strings are anagrams of each other.

title: Minimum Spanning Tree Cost
description: Find the total cost of the minimum spanning tree using Kruskal’s algorithm.

title: Set Bit at Position
description: Set the kth bit of a number (0-based index).

title: Longest Repeating Character Replacement
description: Find the longest substring with at most k replacements to make all characters the same.

title: Chinese Remainder Theorem
description: Solve a system of modular equations with coprime moduli.

title: Polygon Triangulation
description: Compute the minimum cost to triangulate a convex polygon.

title: Independent Set
description: Find the size of the maximum independent set in a tree.

title: Merge Intervals
description: Merge overlapping intervals into non-overlapping ones.

title: String to Integer (atoi)
description: Convert a string to a 32-bit signed integer, handling whitespace, signs, and overflow.

title: Top K Frequent Elements
description: Find the k most frequent elements in an array.

title: Minimum Window Substring
description: Find the smallest substring containing all characters of another string.

title: Euler’s Totient Function
description: Compute the count of numbers up to n that are coprime with n.

title: Segment Tree for Range Sum
description: Build a segment tree to handle range sum queries and updates.

title: Longest Increasing Subsequence
description: Find the length of the longest increasing subsequence in an array.

title: Find Median in Two Sorted Arrays
description: Find the median of two sorted arrays of different sizes.

title: Regular Expression Matching
description: Implement regular expression matching with '.' and '*'.

title: Longest Common Subsequence
description: Find the length of the longest common subsequence between two strings.

title: Binary Tree Level Order Traversal
description: Perform level-order traversal of a binary tree.

title: Flood Fill
description: Fill a region in an image with a new color starting from a given point.

title: Rotate Matrix
description: Rotate a square matrix 90 degrees clockwise in place.

title: Word Break
description: Determine if a string can be segmented into words from a dictionary.

title: Kth Smallest Element in BST
description: Find the kth smallest element in a binary search tree.

title: Clone Graph
description: Clone an undirected graph with adjacency lists.

title: Number of Islands
description: Count the number of islands in a 2D grid where '1' represents land.

title: LRU Cache
description: Implement an LRU (Least Recently Used) Cache.

title: Valid Sudoku
description: Check if a 9x9 Sudoku board is valid.

title: Binary Tree Maximum Path Sum
description: Find the maximum path sum in a binary tree.

title: Trie Implementation
description: Implement a Trie (Prefix Tree) with insert, search, and startsWith operations.
